title: The Night Bloom at Halcyon Glass
summary: After a blackout rehearsal at Halcyon Glass Conservatory, star curator Soren Vale is found dead beneath the Moonbridge Atrium. The fall looks accidental until the rooms, routes, and donor paperwork start contradicting one another.

evidence.title: Opening Brief
evidence.summary: Ashfall intake summary framing the death as an apparent fall that does not sit cleanly with the building or the timing.

evidence.title: Scene Photo: Moonbridge Atrium
evidence.summary: Wide response photo of the atrium floor and lower railing after the conservatory is cleared.

evidence.title: Scene Photo: Propagation Lab
evidence.summary: A clean staff room with one disturbed bench, wet flooring, and displaced soil plugs.

evidence.title: Incident Summary
evidence.summary: Official city summary that leans hard toward an accidental fall before the full review is complete.

evidence.title: Medical Note Addendum
evidence.summary: Short examiner note clarifying the injury pattern without graphic detail.

evidence.title: Public Conservatory Map
evidence.summary: Public-facing layout of the guest areas surrounding the atrium and Moonbridge.

evidence.title: Staff Directory Snapshot
evidence.summary: Cached staff page introducing the departments, titles, and public-facing roles inside Halcyon Glass.

evidence.title: Bridge Camera Still
evidence.summary: A grainy still from the Moonbridge camera moments before the body is discovered.

evidence.title: Service Floorplan
evidence.summary: Staff-only layout showing the propagation lab, mist tunnel, service lift, and loading corridor.

evidence.title: Climate Event Log
evidence.summary: Timestamped system events covering the blackout rehearsal and environmental overrides.

evidence.title: Service Cart Wheel Photo
evidence.summary: Close-up photo of a service cart wheel marked with a bay designation and fresh mineral streaking.

evidence.title: Grounds Radio Call
evidence.summary: Short radio exchange about unexpected condensation in the mist tunnel and a cart left out of bay.

evidence.title: Mist Tunnel Still
evidence.summary: Empty tunnel still showing a fresh wheel track cutting through condensation.

evidence.title: Internal Route Sketch
evidence.summary: Operations sketch of the preferred cart path used to move fragile plant material through service areas.

evidence.title: Nocturne Orchid Microsite
evidence.summary: Donor-facing microsite presenting the Nocturne Orchid as the centerpiece of the preview.

evidence.title: Accession Ledger Extract
evidence.summary: Collection ledger rows showing accession inconsistencies around the Nocturne Orchid entry.

evidence.title: Display Photo: Afternoon Prep
evidence.summary: Phone photo from afternoon setup showing the orchid pedestal before the display materials changed.

evidence.title: Torn Accession Card
evidence.summary: Macro photo of a torn archival card corner with a handwritten accession code and adhesive residue.

evidence.title: Voicemail from Soren Vale
evidence.summary: Tight, hurried voicemail from Soren insisting the preview cannot proceed until the packet is checked.

evidence.title: Interview Thread: Bea Mercer
evidence.summary: Interview transcript in which the intern describes the orchid display changing between afternoon prep and night preview.

evidence.title: Badge Swipes
evidence.summary: Door access events for staff-only spaces during the preview rehearsal window.

evidence.title: Security Interview Audio
evidence.summary: Interview clip in which Mara Ives admits her edit was meant to hide an unauthorized visit, not a killing.

evidence.title: Staff Chat Thread
evidence.summary: Internal chat about cutting Jules Arden’s audio installation from the preview schedule.

evidence.title: Loading Corridor Still
evidence.summary: Corridor still showing the security cover-up was tied to a tool pickup, not the homicide.

evidence.title: Donor Arrival Log
evidence.summary: Front-of-house timeline showing when Daria’s public duties did and did not account for her movements.

evidence.title: Tomas Reed Shift Board
evidence.summary: Night shift whiteboard assigning Tomas Reed away from the propagation spaces during the fatal window.

evidence.title: Broken Lapel Pin
evidence.summary: Macro evidence photo of a broken enamel orchid pin found beneath the propagation bench grating.

evidence.title: Daria Pell Directory Portrait
evidence.summary: Formal directory portrait showing Daria wearing the intact orchid lapel pin.

evidence.title: Donor Fund Memo
evidence.summary: Internal memo on restoration overruns and sponsor pressure routed through donor relations.

evidence.title: Reconstruction Timeline
evidence.summary: Condensed chronology assembled from logs, witness statements, and access records.

stages.title: Opening Pass
stages.summary: Test the accident narrative against the rooms, injuries, and first camera read.
handlerPrompts: Do not let the architecture decide for you. Start with the injury note, then compare it to the room.
The atrium wants to be the answer. Check whether the body agrees.

objectives.prompt: Was Soren killed where he was found in the Moonbridge Atrium?
Where did the lethal incident begin?
Which two exhibits most directly prove the atrium scene was staged?

stages.title: Packet B: The Blackout Route
stages.summary: Reconstruct the unseen path used during the blackout and identify the cart that made it possible.
handlerPrompts: A body can be moved anywhere in this building if you think like staff instead of guests.
The right route needs cover, not speed.

objectives.prompt: Which route bypassed the public-facing cameras during the blackout?

options.label: Propagation Lab -> Mist Tunnel -> Service Lift -> Moonbridge Atrium
Propagation Lab -> Gallery Corridor -> Public Stairs -> Moonbridge Atrium
Rain Chamber -> Service Lift -> Moonbridge Atrium
Propagation Lab -> Loading Corridor -> Cafe Stair -> Moonbridge Atrium

objectives.prompt: Which cart bay designation matches the cart used to move the body?
Did the body pass through the mist tunnel before being placed in the atrium?

stages.title: Packet C: The Missing Provenance
stages.summary: Find the swapped documentation that gave the murder a motive and identify who controlled it.
handlerPrompts: Someone killed to protect a story. Find the document that story needed.
Compare what donors were shown with what the collection records say.

objectives.prompt: What key item was removed or replaced before the preview?

options.label: The original Nocturne Orchid accession card

objectives.prompt: Which two statements about the Nocturne Orchid are true?

options.label: The display documentation changed between afternoon prep and the night preview.
The public provenance story relied on material controlled by donor relations.
Bea Mercer authored the donor provenance packet.
The accession ledger confirmed an unbroken chain of custody.

objectives.prompt: Who had direct control over the donor-facing provenance packet?

stages.title: Packet D: The Alibis That Break
stages.summary: Separate collateral wrongdoing from homicide and isolate the only suspect whose alibi fails in every direction.
handlerPrompts: Two people lied. Only one lied in every direction at once.
Separate obstruction from homicide before you accuse anyone.

objectives.prompt: Which suspect's alibi is contradicted by both access data and private messaging?
Which two revelations are true but do not prove murder?

options.label: Mara Ives altered camera timing to hide an unauthorized visit.
Jules Arden lied about a private meeting with Soren.
Tomas Reed moved the body using service cart C-4.
Bea Mercer replaced the accession card herself.

objectives.prompt: Could Tomas Reed have reached the propagation lab during the fatal window without appearing in the surviving logs?

stages.title: Final Packet: The Night Bloom
stages.summary: Close the loop with a full reconstruction linking person, path, motive, and physical proof.
handlerPrompts: Close the loop. Person, path, motive, object.
By now the building should stop looking elegant and start looking deliberate.

options.label: To conceal the forged provenance scheme and misused donor funds
To take revenge for the cancelled sound installation
To protect the security cover-up over the unauthorized visit
To hide off-book cutting sales from the propagation house

objectives.prompt: Which steps belong in the correct reconstruction of the killing and staging?

options.label: Fatal impact at the potting bench
Body moved on cart C-4 through the mist tunnel and service lift
Fall scene staged at the Moonbridge Atrium
Body left in the propagation lab until dawn
Security feed tampered before the confrontation

objectives.prompt: Which object physically ties Daria to the real scene?
